title: 18V 5000mAh BAT609 Battery for Bosch BAT619G BAT619 BAT609G BAT618 BAT618G BAT610G CRS180 CFL180 CCS180 BSH180 CAG180B HDB180 JSH180, 2 607 336 169, 2 607 336 170
features: Compatibility: Battery for BAT609, BAT609G, BAT618G, 2 607 336 169, 2 607 336 170, CFL180, CFL180B, CRS180, CRS180B, CRS180K, BSH180, FHN180, GBH 18 V-LI, GDR 18 V-LI, GDR 18 V-LIS, GDR 18V-LIMF, GDS 18 V-LI, GHO 18 V-LI, GKS 18 V-LI, GSA 18 V-LI, GSR 18 V-LI, GSR 18 VE-2-LI, GSR 18-2-LI, GSR 18V-LIN, GSR 18V-LINH (Please check the model and shape of your original battery. Make sure you have the correct battery.)
Battery specifications: Battery type: Li-ion, voltage: 18V, capacity: 5000mAh.

Reliable quality: made of high-quality batteries, environmentally friendly, efficient, stable and durable. Almost no memory effect, can be charged or discharged as needed. No dirt, longer service life
Multiple protection: overload test, overload, short circuit, high temperature, high humidity, internal overheating.
Friendly service: if you have any questions, you can contact us at any time, we have a professional team to solve it quickly for you.
description: Compatible models: ("Ctrl" + "F" for searching for your models): für Bosch BAT609, BAT609G, BAT618G, 2 607 336 169, 2 607 336 170 Für BOSCH 17618, 17618-01, 24618-01, 25618, 25618-01, 25618-02, 26618, 26618-01, 3601H61S10, 36618-02, 37618, 37618-01, für Bosch GBH 18 V-LI, GDR 18 V-LI, GDR 18 V-LIS, GDR 18V-LIMF, GDS 18 V-LI, GHO 18 V-LI, GKS 18 V-LI, GSA 18 V-LI, für Bosch CAG180-01, CAG180B, für Bosch CCS180, CCS180B, CCS180K, für Bosch CFL180, CFL180B, für Bosch CRS180, CRS180B, CRS180K, für Bosch DDS180-01, DDS180-03, für Bosch DGSH-181, DGSH181, DGSH181K, für Bosch BSH180, FHN180, für Bosch GSB 18 V-LI, GSB 18 VE-2-LI, GSB 18-2-LI, GSB 18V-LIN, für Bosch GSR 18 V-LI, GSR 18 VE-2-LI, GSR 18-2-LI, GSR 18V-LIN, GSR 18V-LINH, GST 18 V-LIH, GWS 18 V-LI, für Bosch HDB180, HDS180-03, für Bosch HTH181-01, HTH182-01, für Bosch IWH181-01, IWHT180-01, IWHT181-01, für Bosch JSH180, JSH180-01, für Bosch RHH180, RHS181-01, RHS181K Note: Charge the battery after use after cooling. The charger is not included. Please check the model and shape of your original battery. Make sure you have the right battery. Warm tips: Fully charge the battery before first use. Let the batteries of your power tools fully rest after prolonged use. To reduce the risk of fires or burns, do not disassemble, squeeze, puncture or short circuit the external contacts. Always remove the battery from your tool when you assemble, adjust, clean or when not in use for a long time. If you use the battery of the power tool for a month or more, store it in a clean, dry and cool place, away from heat and metal objects. Do not store the battery for a long time. We recommend using the battery at least every two to three weeks. Storage method: Keep the battery away from heat and metallic accessories. Perform a full discharge and charge every month during storage time. Leave the battery on the charger only while charging. Do not store the battery in damp environment or in direct sunlight.
